subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Faḍl! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Blessed art thou for thy enkindlement in the love of God and for thy utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالفضل علیک بهائی و عنایتی طوبی لک و لاشتعالک فی حب الله و لبیانک فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power of prayer, @rejection, opposition and persecution
